title: knautia × sambucifolia
intro: Knautia × sambucifolia, also known as the Sambulflower or Sambucus-like Knautia, is a hybrid plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Knautia × sambucifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
